_comment: Harris County, TX (state_fips=48, county_fips=201) CBP configuration. NAICS 238220 covers both Plumbing and HVAC — split_ratio distributes the shared establishment count. Ratios derived from GBP category prevalence across the Houston metro (observed ~45% plumbing / 55% HVAC in the 238220 pool).

verticals._note: NAICS 238220 is shared with hvac. split_ratio distributes the total.
NAICS 238220 is shared with plumbing. split_ratio distributes the total.
